response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the reference for '大きな愛でもてなして'. Identified and transcribed '妄想アスパルテーム' and '絶対アイドル辞めないで' using on-screen text and audio context. 2. Reference JSON only provided the first song; I used visual cues and audio to complete the medley. 3. Discarded unused lyrics from the reference. 4. Subtitles are precisely aligned with vocal activation and duration, with no overlaps across pauses or transitions.

subtitles.english: I don't need anything but you

subtitles.original: 絶対アイドル辞めないで

subtitles.original: 輝いてる君を 見たい
subtitles.english: I want to see you shining

subtitles.original: もっと ずっと ずっと ステージにいて
subtitles.english: Please stay on stage more, forever and ever

subtitles.original: 私がもし 君の元 離れたなら
subtitles.english: If I were to leave your side...

subtitles.original: 君はちょっと 寂しくなるかな 意地悪考える
subtitles.english: I wonder if you'd be a little lonely; I think mischievous thoughts

subtitles.original: 好きな人が いるのなら 内緒にして
subtitles.english: If you have someone you like, keep it a secret

subtitles.original: ねえ 神様 将来の指輪 どこかに隠してて
subtitles.english: Hey God, please hide the future wedding ring somewhere

subtitles.original: 君の好きに 合わせたんだ 髪の色
subtitles.english: I matched my hair color to your preference

subtitles.original: 私の中 君抜けて

subtitles.english: Where did the remaining few percent go?

subtitles.original: 責任とってね 大好きです
絶対アイドル辞めないで
subtitles.english: Please never quit being an idol

subtitles.original: 優しい目も 真面目な顔も 全て知ってる 私が言う
subtitles.english: Your kind eyes, your serious face; I say this because I know them all

subtitles.original: 絶対そのまま 輝いて
subtitles.english: Please keep shining just as you are

subtitles.original: 星を持つ者が 放つ甘い魔法
subtitles.english: The sweet magic cast by those who hold the stars

subtitles.original: 眩しい君が 世界一だよ
subtitles.english: You, dazzling, are the best in the world
